overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through a vibrant spring countryside with blooming trees, grassy fields, and a distant stone tower. The character moves steadily through the rural landscape passing wooden structures and fences.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through flowering meadows

events.description: wooden hut becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path with swords on his back, moving through tall grass and past blooming white trees

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the countryside
trees with white blossoms lining the left side of the path
tall green grass fields surrounding the path
small rustic wooden structure with dark roof
tall stone keep visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a dirt path through a lush spring landscape. White blooming trees line the left side while tall grass fills the fields. A wooden hut appears on the right as the camera moves forward, and a distant stone tower is visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside with distant stone keep

events.description: distant figure appears standing on the path ahead
wooden fences appear on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward a distant figure and the stone tower, moving through more open fields

notable_agents.action: figure standing on the path in the distance ahead

entered.detail: rustic wooden post fences lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens into wider fields with the stone tower growing larger in the center view. A distant figure stands on the path ahead. Wooden fences begin to appear on the right side as the wooden hut and blooming trees from the previous segment fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail with stone outcrops

events.description: path curves to the right and begins winding through denser vegetation
stone wall appears on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding path through denser vegetation and past stone formations, continuing toward the tower

entered.detail: low stone wall or rock formation alongside the path
thick cluster of trees and bushes on the right side

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the path winding through denser forested areas with a stone wall on the left. The wooden fences give way to thick vegetation, and the stone tower shifts to the left as the path curves. The trail becomes more enclosed as it winds through the countryside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt path that transitions from an open, blooming spring landscape into a more enclosed, forested trail. It begins with Geralt walking past white blooming trees and a wooden hut, with a distant stone tower marking the horizon. As the path opens into wider fields, the tower grows larger in the center view and a distant figure appears ahead while wooden fences emerge on the right. The scene then shifts as the path curves, causing the tower to move to the left and the open fields to give way to a stone wall and thick vegetation. Finally, the trail winds through denser forested areas, becoming increasingly enclosed as it cuts through the countryside.
